title: P1: Production DB connection pool exhausted — full outage
description: DB primary unreachable. All API endpoints returning 503. Triggered at 02:08 UTC. Connection pool at max capacity (200/200). Root cause suspected: connection leak introduced in order-service v2.4.1 deployed at 01:45 UTC.

title: Fix: Close DB transaction in order-service exception handler
description: The retry logic added in v2.4.1 failed to call conn.commit() or conn.rollback() inside the except block, causing connections to remain open in idle_in_transaction state indefinitely. Fix: wrap transaction in context manager to guarantee cleanup.

title: Add alert: DB connection pool > 70% capacity
description: We had no alert until pool was 100% full. Add a warning alert at 70% and critical at 90% so on-call has time to investigate before outage.

title: Add DB connection pool settings to deployment checklist
description: Any service touching DB should specify DB_POOL_MAX and DB_IDLE_TIMEOUT explicitly. Add to PR template and deployment runbook.
